openAnotherTooltip: Close the current log and return to the drop zone to open a different one
languageTooltip: Switch the interface language. Astrophotography terms (RA, Dec, RMS, etc.) stay in English.

dropZone.title: Drop a PHD2 guide log here
dropZone.tooltip: Drop a PHD2 guide log file here. The log is parsed locally; nothing is uploaded.
dropZone.pickFileTooltip: Open the file picker to choose a PHD2 guide log
dropZone.chooseLogsFolderTooltip: Pick your PHD2 logs folder; afterwards every guide log will be browsable from the sidebar
dropZone.browseAllByDate: Browse all your guide logs by date.
